data.body: Superseded by ADR-0047 / epic d4de-7d65-2a96-48be (fleshy-kimberlite-crayfish, 'Retire the auto-lander; land via Gerrit Rebase-If-Necessary + agent Submit'). All four S5 children (S5a 08e1, S5b ea61, S5c 9a6f, S5d 38be) were implemented and landed on origin/main, and the deployed lander ran live (landed Gerrit change #618, MERGED 2026-07-13). The auto-lander was then retired the same day after bug 0d3e (the non-sticky Autosubmit label was dropped by the bot's own rebase, stalling landings under concurrent traffic); ADR-0047 deleted infra/autolander/, the land/land-status command, the compose service, and its observability. Closing as superseded rather than complete: the deliverable no longer exists on origin/main.
